events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: condensate line without trap or sloped wrong. This is non-compliant. IRC M1801 and NFPA 54 require condensate disposal with proper trap and slope. Fail.

events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",

  "findings": [
    "Furnace condensate line installed without a proper trap",
    "Condensate line not sloped correctly to drain by gravity"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install manufacturer-specified condensate trap at correct depth",
    "Re-pitch condensate line to maintain continuous slope toward drain",
    "Verify drain termination is approved and sized correctly"
  ],
  "rationale": "Condensate disposal must include a proper trap and be sloped to drain by gravity per code and manufacturer instructions. A missing trap and incorrect slope can cause improper drainage, condensate backup, and potential damage or safety issues.",
  "references": ["IRC M1801", "NFPA 54"]
}
